manifest.title: SPX 0DTE：GTH、Put/Down 与入场质量修复验证
manifest.description: 真实 trade_ready 回放、v3 五字段契约、forward-only 20-session readiness、GTH 生命周期与账户回放覆盖审计的 2026-07-18 技术快照。

query.sql: SELECT * FROM release_decisions ORDER BY priority
query.description: Evidence-backed engineering and strategy release boundaries in the technical report.
Complete repository test suite plus Ruff and whitespace validation after the fixes and module split.
filters: working tree including K3 and entry-quality fixes
metric_definitions: Tests passed is the terminal pytest count from the complete repository suite.

query.sql: SELECT 5 AS observed_partitions, 4 AS health_complete_sessions, 474 AS evaluations, 452 AS observing, 20 AS blocked, 2 AS trade_ready, 1 AS strict_fills, 800.0 AS production_pnl_usd, 217 AS s2_health_complete, 6 AS s2_proxy_fills, 100.0 AS s2_proxy_pnl_usd
query.description: Point-in-time replay of persisted production trade-ready decisions on health-complete sessions plus a separately labelled S2 observational proxy.
filters: five observed feature partitions through 2026-07-17; four health-complete sessions from 2026-07-14 through 2026-07-17
2026-07-13 excluded because GTH minute coverage is 85.19 percent, below the 90 percent gate
trade-ready uses exact persisted provider, contract, limit and window
target/invalidation before fill remains a skip without PnL
outcome horizons excluded from production entry gates
S2 excluded from production strategy total
metric_definitions: Observing is non-terminal telemetry and is neither pass nor block.
Strict fill is the first recorded-provider ask at or below the persisted limit before the exclusive expiry window.
Production PnL includes only baseline naked trades from the trade_ready set.

query.sql: SELECT 6 AS confirmations, 6 AS virtual_opens, 2 AS opens_after_600s_ttl, 5261.461 AS max_lag_seconds
query.description: Event-id join of GTH confirmations and historical virtual opens, excluding the partial 2026-07-18 partition.
filters: future clock skew tolerated through five seconds
historical 600-second validity reconstructed because legacy signals lack valid_until
metric_definitions: Stale means virtual opened more than 600 seconds after confirmation.

query.sql: SELECT * FROM replay_robustness ORDER BY entry_age_seconds
query.description: Seven core GTH Call debit rounds compared on threshold-specific common cohorts; rows are data-coverage sensitivity, not strategy parameter sensitivity.
filters: sat85, trail33 and clock must all have a valid exit
metric_definitions: Common is the count of rounds with valid exits under all three rules at that quote gate.
Changing the age/skew gate changes cohort membership.

query.description: Reconciles current production replay, corrected S2 proxy, retired legacy diagnostics and GTH lifecycle lags.

query.sql: SELECT 5 AS observed_partitions, 4 AS health_complete_sessions, 0 AS contract_consistent_sessions, 0 AS gth_exact_entries, 0 AS put_exact_entries, 0 AS exact_spread_complete_exits, 43 AS legacy_material_decisions_excluded, 20 AS target
query.description: Frozen forward-only review gate. Five partitions were observed, four are health-complete, and 43 pre-v3 material decisions are retained for audit but excluded from forward evidence.
filters: GTH and RTH minute coverage at least 90 percent
metric_definitions: A complete session is one research expiry with both GTH and RTH minute coverage at or above 90 percent and no forward contract anomaly.
Repeated service evaluations never count as additional sessions or opportunities.
Ready means eligible for a fixed-cutoff human review, not automatic promotion.

cards.description: Complete repository pytest result after all fixes.
Feature-store partitions observed through the fixed cutoff; observation alone does not mean health-complete or contract-consistent.
Sessions passing the 90 percent GTH/RTH minute-coverage health gate; these predate the forward policy window and do not count toward readiness.
Contract-consistent forward-v3 sessions toward the frozen 20-session review gate.
Unique persisted production entry decisions through the cutoff.
Production decisions that satisfy exact limit-window replay.

charts.title: Replay coverage by evidence cohort
charts.subtitle: Production is the only strategy cohort; S2 is observational and historical GTH exact spread is unavailable
charts.question: How much of each evidence cohort survives to a replayed baseline entry?
charts.rationale: The categorical bar chart exposes the production sample bottleneck while keeping proxy roles explicit.

tables.title: Forward-only readiness gates
tables.subtitle: Current independent v3 samples versus frozen review thresholds; legacy v1/v2 rows are excluded.

tables.title: Production intent telemetry
tables.subtitle: Evaluation records are not unique opportunities; observing is neither pass nor block.

tables.title: Exact production trade-ready replay
tables.subtitle: One fill and one target-before-entry; no skipped intent is assigned zero PnL.

tables.title: Retired diagnosis versus corrected evidence
tables.subtitle: Legacy values remain only as an error audit and are not current strategy evidence.

tables.title: Historical GTH confirmation-to-open lags
tables.subtitle: Two of six virtual opens exceed the reconstructed 600-second validity window.

tables.title: Account replay quote-coverage sensitivity
tables.subtitle: Each age/skew row has a different common cohort; values are not a strategy parameter comparison.

tables.title: Release boundaries
tables.subtitle: Deterministic safety fixes are separated from unvalidated strategy hypotheses.

blocks.body:
# SPX 0DTE：GTH、Put/Down 与入场质量修复验证

**状态：v3 工程契约已落地；forward readiness 0/20，策略保持 collecting/shadow，自动下单关闭。**

## Technical Summary

旧报告的 S2/GTH/Put 负值不是 production 策略表现：S2 只是 follow-through-only proxy，12 笔旧交易中 0 笔曾进入 trade_ready；chain_implied_spx 又被错误映射为 ES-45，并有 semantic duplicates。当前严格 production cohort 只有 2 个 trade-ready：1 个 Call 模拟成交 +$800，1 个 Put 在限价满足前先到目标，因而无入场、无 PnL。n=2 只证明语义修正，不能证明方向或策略 edge。

GTH 历史 6 次 virtual open 中有 2 次在确认后 826 秒和 5,261 秒才开仓。新代码用 v3 五字段契约、exclusive valid_until、suppression/provider reset 和 exact executable NBBO fail closed；趋势一致性只做版本化 shadow。

新的裁决门只接纳自然产生的 forward-v3 evidence：本次 cutoff 有 5 个 observed partitions、4 个 health-complete sessions；2026-07-13 因 GTH 覆盖仅 85.19% 被排除。四个健康完整 session 均早于 forward policy window，因此 contract-consistent session、GTH exact entry、Put exact entry 和 exact-spread complete exit 全部为 0/20。另有 43 条 legacy material decision 被排除，只作审计。未达门槛时 GTH、Put、sat85/trail33/clock 均保持 collecting/shadow；达标也只进入人工 review，不会自动晋级。

> 内部工程与策略研究快照，不构成投资建议；automatic_ordering=False。

## Key Findings

1. Put 方向映射没有反转；267/267 的 play、right、direction 一致。
2. 旧 8 笔 Put/-$1,730 与 GTH 坐标错误和重复混杂，不能据此禁 Put。
3. 474 evaluations 中 452 observing 不是 pass/block；真实 trade-ready 只有 2 个。
4. 健康完整 cohort 的 S2 proxy 为 217 unique、6 replay entries、+$100，但只作观察，不计 production total。
5. GTH 直接工程缺陷是 2/6 stale opens；经济趋势门因 n=6 只能 shadow。
6. v3 已统一 schema、policy、validity、coordinate 和 block reasons；43 条旧 v1/v2 material decision 永久只作历史审计。
7. 20 session 不是 20 次 evaluation；5 个 observed partitions 中只有 4 个 health-complete，当前四项 forward readiness 均为 0/20。

## 冻结的 forward-only 裁决门

截止 2026-07-17 观察到 5 个 partition，其中 2026-07-14..17 四个通过健康完整门；2026-07-13 的 GTH 覆盖为 673/790（85.19%），低于 90% 门槛。完整 session 还要求参与裁决的 forward 事件契约一致、没有重复 semantic sample；四个健康完整 session 均早于 forward policy window，所以 contract-consistent 仍为 0/20。readiness 显式排除 43 条 legacy material decision。每个 signal、intent 或 episode 最多计一次；服务轮询产生的重复 evaluation 不增加样本。以下四项达到 20 只代表 ready for review，automatic promotion 永远关闭。

## Put/Down 怎么处理

不硬禁 Put。唯一 production Put 在 15:51:04Z 已触及记录目标，直到 15:51:25Z ask 才低于限价；正确结果是 target_before_entry，而不是事后记一笔亏损。RTH Put 继续 collecting/shadow，并固定按 RTH/GTH × direction × thesis 分层；同时收满 20 个 forward complete session 和 20 个 point-in-time exact Put entries 前不得晋级。

## GTH 怎么改善

立即 enforce 的是机制安全门：v3 五字段契约、exclusive signal TTL、suppression/provider reset、raw-ES coordinate、same-session exact legs、双腿新鲜同步有序 NBBO、0 < debit ask < width。趋势方向属于收益假设：历史 6 个信号重放都在 bearish regime，但这是事后 legacy 小样本，所以只登记 gth_trend_alignment_shadow_v1。收满 20 个 forward sessions 和 20 个 exact GTH entries 前不得晋级。

## 为什么原 replay 三行会从负变正

门越宽，common cohort 越大。30s/5s 恰好只留下核心 7 个实际回合中唯一的亏损回合；90s/15s 和 300s/60s 加入的是盈利回合。三行改变了样本组成，不能解释成 age 参数改善了策略。

## Methodology

Production replay 只读持久化 trade-ready；使用 exact provider/contract/limit/window，并在成交前检查 recorded target/invalidation。S2 official SPX、chain parity、raw ES 分开处理，缺原生路径 fail closed；按 semantic key 去重。未来 outcome horizons 不进入 entry gate；未成交和缺失不填 0。

Forward readiness 只读自然产生的 v3 事件；policy 按 producer role 冻结，valid_until 使用半开区间，coordinate 不做隐式换算，block reasons 必须可审计。v1/v2 原样保留但永不补写成 v3。

## Limitations and Robustness

Production 只有 2 个 intent、1 个模拟成交；历史窗口不是正式 OOS。旧 intent 的 stored expires_at 反映当时 runtime，而当前代码已固定 20 秒 entry window。GTH detector 没有用 raw ES 全量重检；forward-v3 exact-spread evidence 为 0/20，legacy/derived spread 不得回填。Top-of-book 不含队列、滑点、部分成交、人工反应或真实佣金。账户 replay 缺失非随机且不能按 event_id 归因 K3。

## Recommended Next Steps

1. 部署 v3、TTL、reset 和 executable-NBBO 工程门，自动下单继续关闭。
2. GTH trend alignment 保持 collecting/shadow；20 sessions 与 20 exact GTH entries 前不得晋级。
3. RTH Put 不硬禁；20 sessions 与 20 exact Put entries 前不得晋级。
4. 持续保存 policy/config fingerprint、真实 entry window、fill-time NBBO 和 terminal block reasons。
5. 收满 20 个 exact-spread complete exits 后，才在固定 cutoff 比较 sat85/trail33/clock。
6. 每周刷新 readiness，但只在冻结门槛满足后触发人工 review，绝不自动 promotion。

## Further Questions

- 20 个 forward sessions 与 20 个 exact GTH entries 后，bullish-alignment shadow 的 coverage 和同 cohort outcome 如何？
- 更多 Put/Call 中 target_before_entry 的比例是多少？
- blocked reasons 中哪些是策略过滤，哪些是采集缺失？
- synthetic:SPXW_PARITY 是否应进入 quote lake？
- fill-time NBBO 能否降低 account replay 的非随机缺失？

strategy_readiness.before_target: GTH entry and trend remain shadow
Put remains shadow; neither banned nor promoted
sat85, trail33 and clock remain shadow

intent_status.meaning: Non-terminal telemetry; neither pass nor block
Unique decisions eligible for strict replay

release_decisions.basis: Direct lifecycle bugs; no economic tuning
Prevents malformed or non-executable debit shadow
Legacy v1/v2 remains audit-only and is never backfilled
Repeated evaluations are not independent evidence; promotion is manual only
Requires 20 forward sessions and 20 exact GTH entries
Requires 20 forward sessions and 20 exact Put entries
Corrected proxy is not the production gate

query.sql: SELECT * FROM release_decisions ORDER BY priority
SELECT 5 AS observed_partitions, 4 AS health_complete_sessions, 474 AS evaluations, 2 AS trade_ready, 1 AS strict_fills, 800.0 AS production_pnl_usd
query.description: Exact persisted trade-ready replay and corrected S2 observational proxy over health-complete sessions.
Reconciles current and retired diagnostic evidence.

query.sql: SELECT 5 AS observed_partitions, 4 AS health_complete_sessions, 0 AS contract_consistent_sessions, 0 AS gth_exact_entries, 0 AS put_exact_entries, 0 AS exact_spread_complete_exits, 43 AS legacy_material_decisions_excluded, 20 AS target
query.description: Frozen forward-only review gate; 43 legacy v1/v2 material decisions are excluded and automatic promotion is disabled.
